title: “Whistleblowing strengthens democracy but exposes individuals to ethical risks.” Discuss the statement. Evaluate the need for protective frameworks.
description: Q7. “Whistleblowing strengthens democracy but exposes individuals to ethical risks.” Discuss the statement. Evaluate the need for protective frameworks.
